final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: product photography, commercial shot
Primary request: professional product photography of a smartwatch on marble surface, minimalist business aesthetic
Scene/backdrop: clean marble tabletop, soft neutral background with subtle depth
Subject: modern smartwatch with sleek metal casing, premium finish, positioned as hero product
Style/medium: professional product photography, minimalist commercial style
Composition/framing: eye-level medium shot, shallow depth of field, smartwatch as focal point
Lighting/mood: soft natural side light from window, gentle shadows, clean and sophisticated mood
Color palette: neutral whites and grays, warm metal tones, soft brown from coffee cup
Materials/textures: polished marble with subtle veining, brushed metal smartwatch, ceramic coffee cup, paper notebook texture
Constraints: keep smartwatch as clear focal point, maintain minimalist composition, preserve natural light quality
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh artificial lighting, oversaturated colors, distracting background elements, watermark
